# CWE-826: Premature Release of Resource During Expected Lifetime (mitigated, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-826-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"context"
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
	"time"
)

// Safe: waits for the worker to finish before releasing the database handle.
func WarmCache(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(r.Context(), 2*time.Second)
	defer cancel()
	done := make(chan struct{})
	go func() {
		_, _ = db.QueryContext(ctx, "SELECT 1")
		close(done)
	}()
	<-done
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
